problem: How to predict drug-receptor binding affinity from molecular structure without wet lab?
mechanism: Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics
hypothesis: Combining Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Security audit with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
